scripts.start:apps: concurrently -n customer,rider,vendor,admin -c blue,magenta,green,cyan "node -e \"console.log('Customer App running at: http://localhost:8081')\" && npm --prefix customer-app run start -- --port 8081" "node -e \"console.log('Rider App running at: http://localhost:8082')\" && npm --prefix rider-app run start -- --port 8082" "node -e \"console.log('Vendor App running at: http://localhost:8083')\" && npm --prefix vendor-app run start -- --port 8083" "node -e \"console.log('Admin App running at: http://localhost:8084')\" && npm --prefix admin-app run start -- --port 8084"
